question: Will Grand Theft Auto 6 be released as the next rockstar game?
resolution_criteria:
Resolves NO if Rockstar releases another game before GTA6. expansions to GTA5 or RDD2 do not count

Things that would count

Bully 2

Red dead remeption remake

Agent

GTA remakes

Any other new title

Resolves on release day, not based on announcements
